case_title: UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA VS. JAMES WALDROP

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALDROP, JAMES $27,072.79 PRINCIPAL, $1,157.08 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,454.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
